title: [USP] Ultimate-Space-Pack
description: The best modpack for fun space exploration in minecraft
body:
# The BEST for people who like space exploration games
Do **YOU** want to explore space... but in minecraft? then this will be th modpack for you! you can visit different planets and find hidden civilisations, mysterious treasures an more. This modpack will help you explore it all!


## Explore
Explore multiple planets in our solar system! Search for treasure's in structures all over Mars, Venus, Mercuri and more. You can even visit another solar system!

## Made by gamers, for gamers
Personally I play this modpack almost every day. Why not share it for others to see? I love space and rockets, but I also love mining and crafting

## What to expect:

1. Sodium (along some more optimization mods)
2. Vein-mining
3. Space (Ad Astra)
4. Create
5. Compressed Blocks (CB: Compressed Blocks)
6. Various mods about camera, movement and animations (including zoom)
7. Sound mods
8. Distant horizons to see further then you could as a human
9. First person model
10. Many **MANY** quality of life mods that make the game much easier

And many more

##
